top_signals.title: Russia launches third air attack on Kyiv in a week, officials say
top_signals.summary: The recent missile attacks exploit Ukraine's critical shortage of U.S.-made air-defense interceptors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI Chip Startup SambaNova Raises Funds at $11 Billion Valuation
top_signals.summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: This former Apple executive is betting on Shenzhen, not Silicon Valley, to create the 'next Apple'
top_signals.summary: Startups building consumer electronics will have a better shot at becoming the next Apple in Shenzhen than in Silicon Valley, said Will Wang, CEO of China's smart-glasses startup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese hackers develop LONGLEASH malware to expand ORB network
top_signals.summary: Chinese hackers tracked as 'UAT-7810' are actively evolving their malware to expand their Operational Relay Box (ORB) network by compromising internet-facing networking devices, primarily unpatched Ruckus routers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The digital transformation of money, payments and finance
Unite Group Offers Discounted Dorms in Bid to Ramp Up Sales
top_signals.summary: The Unite Group Plc has begun offering discounted rents to some students as the landlord looks to boost reservations for the next academic year.

top_signals.title: Curaleaf Launches Free CPD-Accredited Platform to Close Medical Cannabis Training Gap for UK Healthcare Professionals
top_signals.summary: Curaleaf International, one of the global leaders in medical cannabis, announces the launch of the Curaleaf Education Platform, providing access to CPD-accredited medical cannabis training for healthcare professionals across the UK. A Curaleaf survey of UK GPs found that just 4% had received any formal education on medical cannabis, and 81% described their understanding of [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: LDP and JIP agree to delay bill to reduce Lower House seats
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and JIP chief Hirofumi Yoshimura decided to postpone debate on the bill to a later session of parliament.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Record Launches “Record Amanah” Sharia-Compliant Investment Platform
top_signals.summary: Record Asset Management GmbH (RAM), subsidiary of London-listed Record plc (Record Financial Group), is pleased to announce the launch of Record Amanah, its dedicated platform for Sharia-compliant investment solutions. RAM is the European asset management arm of Record Financial Group, the London-listed specialist investment group managing USD 115 billion of assets on behalf of institutional [...]
